articles.title: DJI will pay $30K to the man who accidentally hacked 7,000 Romo robovacs - The Verge
articles.description: DJI will pay Sammy Azdoufal $30,000 after he used Claude Code to accidentally access a network of 7,000 robot vacuums.

articles.title: Valve’s Steam Machine may not launch this year - The Verge
articles.description: Valve confirms to The Verge that the Steam Machine, Steam Frame, and Steam Controller will ship in 2026, despite an earlier version of a blog post that suggested the timeline wasn’t as firm.
